FABLE'S MOD

WASD / Shift / Spacemove / sprint / jump
1–6physgun · spawner · hose · boom · rope · thruster
Sprint + walk into propsbody-check them across the map
LMB / RMBuse tool / alt use
Scrollphysgun distance · spawner item
Rspin held prop
Ccut rope (aimed, or on held prop)
G / F / Xzero-g props / slow-mo / clear
/ · hdebug pane · this help

FABLE'S MOD

a physics playground
